classes.description: Assistant asserts facts that are unsupported by available evidence or contradicted by trace/state.
Assistant routes an intent to the wrong tool family or claims no route despite valid capability.
Assistant does not provide a substantive response when one is required.
Assistant repeats the same fallback/template response across turns.
Assistant output contains content from unrelated tools/results relative to user intent.
Policy/lease-denied conditions are framed inaccurately or without bounded remediation guidance.
